statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: First line contains one integer n; second line contains n space separated integers
statement.notes: Time complexity: O(n^2) where n is the number of elements in the array

hints.text: First hint text: Check the sorting algorithm used in the code.

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.intuition: Explanation of the correct approach: Use built-in sort function or implement bubble sort to sort the array in ascending order. Then reverse the sorted array to get the array in reverse order.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach summary: Check all possible solutions.
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution details: Use bubble sort algorithm to sort the array in ascending order. Then reverse the sorted array to get the array in reverse order.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Correctness proof: Test the code with sample inputs and verify the output.
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run: Use sample inputs to demonstrate how the code works.
commonMistakes: Mistake 1: Not sorting the array in ascending order
Mistake 2: Not reversing the sorted array
